title: Gigachad Totem
description:
Change The totem to Gigachad
For Gigachad Fans
body:
# Resource Pack 
The *Resource Pack changes the totem's appearance from golden to **[Gigachad](https://www.google.com/search?q=Gigachad&oq=Gigachad&gs_lcrp=EgZjaHJvbWUyCQgAEEUYORiABDIHCAEQABiABDIHCAIQABiABDIHCAMQABiABDIHCAQQABiABDIHCAUQLhiABDIGCAYQRRg8MgYIBxBFGDwyBggIEEUYPDIHCAkQABiABDIHCAoQABiABDIHCAsQABiABDIHCAwQABiABDIHCA0QABiABDIHCA4QABiABNIBCDE1OTVqMGo3qAIUsAIB8QW_aXFJEhryZg&client=ms-android-vivo-terr1-rso2&sourceid=chrome-mobile&ie=UTF-8)**.
this resource pack made for Gigachad Fans😂

(**Totem Name Changed**)

---------------------------

(*it's just an appearance and doesn't add any properties to the totem)
By Xx_yousss_xX
